title: fix: resolve APPS.md conflict markers and restore 18 missing apps
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: The lost flowers return
gist.blurb: We found 18 missing apps hiding behind some merge conflicts. The garden is full again.
gist.summary: Resolved merge conflicts in the apps registry, restoring 18 missing community submissions and standardizing categories.
gist.impact: The showcase now correctly displays all 561 apps with up-to-date information.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee finding lost flower pots (representing apps) behind a glitchy barrier and restoring them to the garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot discovering colorful pixel flower pots hidden behind a glitchy digital hedge. She is placing them back into a neat garden row. Lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach background. Warm lighting, wholesome vibes like Stardew Valley. Text in pixel font: 'FOUND THEM'. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
